entry.title: Re: Create or modify the background element for Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hello @xavierlegarrec 
Thankyou for the response.

Currently, we are using the below formulae for basis calculation but this creates slight mismatch if there are leave of absence for any assignments 

salary*(targetPct/100) *((365-cust_LoA)/365)

cust_LoA is a direct input field in EC and we are updating it manually in case of leave of absence for employees

So the requirement is to change the formulae and include startdate and end date of history assignments  to get the correct output via below for 2024

salary*(targetPct/100)*(endDate-startDate-cust_LoA+1)/366)

Best Regards

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Re: Learn All About How to view or download license keys requested by users in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Very much useful information.
I greatly appreciate your blog 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition - Display Serial Nu...
entry.content:
Hi MariusSiegel,

While printing Warehouse Order Pick List from Outbound Delivery, we observed that Serial Numbers are not being displayed in the Pick List print form. The template used to print the form is "EWM_PICK_LIST_2" Please find the below screenshot of Pick List. Please let us know is there any way to print Serial Numbers in the Pick List ? 

 

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Rework Processing - Stock-Manufactured Material (BJN)...
entry.content:
Hello, Serial number will be created during goods receipt based on the serial number profile updated in the material master. Update the serial number usage as None (No serial numbers are assigned), Optional (can be assign) , Obligatory (Must) and Automatic according to the requirement  .There is no option for updating a serial number profile specific to an order type.

Thanks and Regards,

Vairavan.P

entry.title: Re: doc type value key in me21n
entry.content:
On SAP screen, 

Step 1: alt +f12

Step 2: options 

Step3: interaction design tab

Step4: visualization 1 

Step5: under controls tab check both boxes 

Save. 

Good to go

entry.title: Re: How to use OAuth 2.0 authorization while using SAP S/...
entry.content: We have the same problem, does anyone have more insights?

entry.title: Re: Using versions with Datasphere Analytic Models in Pla...
entry.content: Thank you for the answer. It was helpful.

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud and Advanced Adaptive Search
entry.content:
Introduction

Adaptive Search is missing a key feature that could unleash your merchandising creativity. Most part of your users are using full-text search instead of category tree to browse your product catalog. 

Fine tune search result from a specific text search is the key to address accurate merchandising strategy.

This article will quickly guide you how this new capability could be implemented. Nevertheless, it is important to keep in mind that fine tuning must be applied after a global SOLR configuration. Fortunately, SAP Expert Services is proposing this service through SAP Commerce Cloud SOLR Guidance. Please send us a request if you're interesting by at SAP Expert Services

 

Demo

Please watch this following video demo (coming soon)

 

 

Architecture Overview

Adaptive Search is module in middle between SAP Commerce and SOLR search engine. Before and after SOLR query, Adaptive Search configurations are applied to influence search result. In this perspective, you can understand that global SOLR configuration must be done before to activate Adaptive Search module.

 

Adaptive Search Perspective

In this screenshot, we can see widgets decomposition which is important for integrating correctly the new capability and to offer the best administration user experience.

In this diagram, we can see widgets communications that allows data exchange. NavigationContext data represents global state to this perspective. Each widget needs this data state to give correct output. SearchProfileContext data is used to persist Adaptive Search current configuration in database.

 

Conclusion

Adaptive Search has been designed to be extended and enriched for fitting specific business needs. However, integrating this capability in existing SAP Commerce Cloud solution which could has derived a bit from standard can demand some effort. 

SAP Expert Services is proposing a booster (ready-to-use extension) to provide you this capability in shorter time and effort. Moreover, we could take this opportunity to review together your existing solution and best practices.

If you're interesting by, please send us a request to SAP Expert Services

entry.title: Deleting a Table from Excel Using ABAP2XLSX
entry.content:
Hello, everyone.

I'm working with ABAP2XLSX and need to delete an existing table from an Excel file. However, I haven't been able to find a method in the ZCL_EXCEL_WORKSHEET class that allows me to remove a table.

Does anyone have any advice?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Using on-premise systems in your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant
entry.content: Nice blog post! Very informative and intact! Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: How to access Work Zone Content from the Configuration Editor?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

first time posting, so please excuse possible mistakes in posting this question. 

I'm facing the following problem. I developed an UI Integration Card in SAP Business Application Studio, which makes use of the Configuration Editor, when imported into SAP Work Zone AE. Despite the shown possibilities, I don't understand how I can make content, residing in a Work Zone workspace, accessable in this Configuration Editor. What I'm aiming for, would be something similar to the Configuration Editor of the Rotating Banner Widget: 

I would appreciate it very much, if someone could nudge me into the right direction on how to face this problem. What I saw by inspecting our Work Zone instance, is the content_ajax calls made by Work Zone to fetch the content data. But how I could make them usable in the Configuration Editor, is out of my current understanding. 

Thank you very much in advance. 

Max

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition SAPUI5 SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: Signavio Process Insights: insufficient data collection for certain performance indicators
entry.content:
Hello,

I am using Signavio PA model, connected ECC system via intermediate (sandbox) system to Process Insights. All data collection runs are showing as successful. One of the observations, some of the performance indicators have not collected sufficient data to show accurate results.

e.g. For the performance indicator: Financial documents created (KFFI000106), there are very few data objects collected (in 2 digits) and seems that is not enough to give accurate %automation rate.

Is there a way around this? A way to push historical data from source system via sandbox? or if something is happening wrong during data collection? 

 

regards,

Rounak

entry.title: Re: table name for link between internal order and Fund centers,fund and commit
entry.content:
Table names are created dynamically, so it's not recommended to retrieve via SELECT statement. A tested way to do this is by calling public method CALL_FMDERIVE of class CL_GTR_UTILS

 

  DATA:
    ls_source   TYPE fmderive,
    ls_target   TYPE fmderive.

  TRY.
      CLEAR: ls_source, ls_target.
"populate company code, account number, cost center and posting date
"funds management area
      ls_source-company_code  = 'GR01'.  "<- sample data values
      ls_source-account_number   = '6400000000'.
      ls_source-cost_center   = '7000000000'.
      ls_source-posting_date  = sy-datum.
* Derive FM Area
      SELECT SINGLE abadrenv FROM fmderiveenvid
                             INTO ls_source-fm_area
                            WHERE applclass = 'FM'
                              AND comp_code = ls_source-company_code.


      CALL METHOD cl_gtr_utils=>call_fmderive
        EXPORTING
          is_fmderive_src=ls_source
        RECEIVING
          rs_fmderive_target = ls_target.
    CATCH cx_gtr_utils_exc .
  ENDTRY.

entry.title: Re: Introduction of SAC Multi-actions Public API
entry.content:
Hi @Elif ,

currently it is still possible to add the property. You just define the property Name: SystemUser and enter the value.

BR,

Hannes

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
If you CANNOT have multiple rows for the same dimension values, then OK.

If you CAN have multiple rows, then what I mentioned only impacts if you can have multiple rows because:

TABLE A

D1D2D3M1
ABC1
ABC3

TABLE B

D1D2D3M1
ABC2
ABC2

UNION ALL

D1D2D3M1 OLDM1 NEW
ABC10
ABC30
ABC02
ABC02

AGGR

D1D2D3M1 OLDM1 NEW
ABC44

As you can see, the AGGR comes out the same, but the rows in the two tables were not the same. This doesn't happen with the MINUS.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Onboarding email services recipient
entry.content:
Hi Melisa,

Currently we don not have that option.
As a work around we have added the required people in Onboarding dynamic groups and then selected the receipeint type as Dynamic group receipient builder and added that group as recepient.

Thanks,

Satya!

entry.title: How to find Process Chain Name from SM37 JOB
entry.content:
Hi all!

This topic has come up more than once. But I didn't find the answer.

We have background jobs. We can see them in SM37. I'm specifically interested only in jobs broadcast. How can I find chain information by job name?

The name of the first task in the picture is BIBCAST0MNRRXXM0PI63KHK92B09LAA8. (picture SM37 shows)

We can see that it corresponds to the program RSBATCH_EXECUTE_PROZESS with the variant &0000019591199. (SM37 job journal)

In which table can you see the correspondence of this PROGRAM and VARIANT to the program being launched with its variant?

In SE38 we can see Text for VARIANT

How can I translate this VARIANT (Text of VARIANT) to name and variant starting program or name of chain or name of node chain? Any useful information.
For this example I know this is RSRD_BROADCAST_BATCH with the variant Z_DS_BLR. Picture RSRD_LOG below.

Where and why can I find corresponding between

RSBATCH_EXECUTE_PROZESS with the variant &0000019591199 and

RSRD_BROADCAST_BATCH with the variant Z_DS_BLR ?

I want to know CHAIN NAME (or CHAIN NODE NAME) that started this job (by JOB NAME or JOB COUNT). Or I just need to know the variant for RSRD_BROADCAST_BATCH (picture RSRD_LOG shows) corresponding JOB NAME in SM37 (Picture #1 / table TBTCO).

The picture shows the node of chain for this example. I know this chain. 

But I don’t know all running chains. I think there should be tables that have this corresponding without compress/decompress text.

Respect and gratitude for your help.
Igor

entry.title: BAPI_NETWORK_MAINTAIN Massive mode
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we are using the BAPI_NETWORK_MAINTAIN for massive changes. We have an issue that we can't solve: when the BAPI encounters an error, it stops and doesn’t provide evidence of all other errors nor does it indicate the operation that caused the error (message CJ280). However, from CJ20N we get a log with all the precise errors. If you execute the BAPI for each individual operation, you do get error details. Unfortunately, this second approach has worse performance, so we can’t use it.

Do you have any advice?

Thank's,
Vito

entry.title: Re: how to use LT0G
entry.content:
LT0G transaction is used to cancel transfer order in delivery. It reversed the transfer order stock.

Hope it will help you

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Delete Analytics Measurement data
entry.content: I've found a solution by scheduling a job on the program /PERSONAS/DELETE_MEASUREMENTS

entry.title: Re: iOS Build Failing

entry.title: migrating from WPB 9.5.1 straight to the SAP Enable now Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi, 

A bit of a background

  • Currently, we have multiple work areas within SAP WPB 9.5.1
    • We have issues with creating documentation since WPB is not compatible with Microsoft 365
  • The business recently accepted the case that allowed us to buy SAP Enable Now Cloud.

Questions?

  1. Is it possible to migrate the current resources and content to the Enable Now cloud edition without first upgrading the WPB to SEN 10.0.0?
  2. When migrating, will the resources be updated to reflect the new document types (If this is a manual creation, then please say)
  3. How to trigger a mass update so the current documentation picks up the latest version of the resources with the upgraded document types instead of referring to the resources that have incompatible document types, e.g. Documentations

thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Multiple uom per Item without groups
entry.content: Hola, ten cuidado con esta configuración porque una mala configuración puede dar lugar a inconsistencias. Revisa este foro (https://foros.consultoria-sap.com/t/discusion-sobre-unidades-de-medida-y-grupos/31837). En SAP B1 se puede usar los dos tipo de configuración la que trae por defecto el sistema "Manual" y añadir la multiple (grupos de unidades de medida), es decir pueden convivir artículos con unidades de medida manual y otros con unidades de medida multiple.

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
Okay , it make sense when we have duplicates  , Thank for taking your time in explaining the case with an example. Its clear now what you are referring.

Br

Kiran K

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: Hana Cloud Dashboard "Uh oh. Something went amiss."
entry.content: yes i got same

entry.title: Don't "let it crash", is this the new CAP guideline?
entry.content:
Dear fellow CAP practitioners,

One of the Added features in nodejs version of cds@8.2.0 is the "New config flag `cds.server.shutdown_on_uncaught_errors` allows to control whether the server should shut down on uncaught errors. Default is `true`". Is this a pointer to CAP (nodejs) moving away from "let it crash"? 

I tried to see if I can keep the old behavior (missing in cds@8.1) and invoked an operation with undefined variable. This would crash the server in cds@7 and cds@6. But to my surprise, the server did not crash, with or without the new flag. It does crash if I switch to the old odata parser though (features.odata_new_adapter:false). So the new parser is already ready to chug along even with previous uncaught exceptions. 

It appears the REST adapter never bought into "let it crash". It was already doing what the new odata adapter does in cds@7. It responds with 500 and is ready for the next request. 

There were many who doubted the "let it crash" approach in the community, Is the CAP Error Handling approach of "Let It Cras... . Is CAP listening these voices? What about the inherent concerns about unhandled errors leaving the single threaded server in a bad state.  

What do you think? Is this a good way forward for CAP in nodejs? 

regards,

Dinu

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Hi @DirkO ,

when using a HANA backend you can switch to SDA with the Cloud Connector, correct. Here, you cannot filter in the remote table itself, as that is not supported but at least you dont need the 2nd approach from the blog, 1st approach should be enough to push down the filter.

BR,

Thore

entry.title: Configure the SWFVISU for Parked document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently trying to create the visualization parameters on SWFVISU for displaying header and item information of 'Parked Document' (Business Object: FIPP) I was looking for the corresponding My Inbox FIORI Service, and i came up with one service 'Verify Journal Entries in General Ledger - For Processor (Inbox)',

I tried to fill all the parameters in my custom task (TS90000084) based on standard task,

 

however, it didnt work and it showed error 

Can anyone share the correct visualization parameter for custom decision task of Parked Document (FIPP)?

 

Regards,

Muhammad Febrian Rizky

entry.title: ERPsim Manufacturing Sustainability Game (Preset 3)
entry.content:
San Andrés Cholula, Puebla México 16 de julio de 2024 – Once alumnos de la Universidad Madero (UMAD) de las carreras de Administración e Innovación de Negocios, Mercadotecnia, Comercio Exterior y Derecho Aduanero, Finanzas, Banca e Inversión Extranjera y Contabilidad Financiera participaron exitosamente en el desafiante «ERPsim Manufacturing Sustainability Game (Preset 3) with SAP S/4 HANA and SAP Fiori», el simulador de mayor complejidad en la suite de juegos-simulaciones de ERPsim con SAP S/4 HANA y SAP Fiori.

La participación de los estudiantes en el juego-simulador fue parte de su segundo curso especializado en el sistema empresarial SAP S/4 HANA y las simulaciones del ERPsim. El objetivo del juego es llevar a cabo la administración de una compañía virtual de cereales para el desayuno, abarcando la adquisición de materia prima, planeación y administración de la manufactura, mercadotecnia, distribución y venta de los productos.

Cada estudiante asumió el rol de director de una área clave en la compañía: Planeación, Compras, Manufactura, Distribución, Ventas, Mercadotecnia y Finanzas. A través de informes personalizados y las avanzadas capacidades analíticas de SAP S/4 HANA with SAP Fiori (SAP Smart Business), los participantes tuvieron la oportunidad de analizar datos y tomar decisiones en tiempo real, con el objetivo de optimizar la rentabilidad, la eficiencia operativa y minimizar las emisiones de carbono. El equipo que logró la mayor valoración de la empresa, basada en estos indicadores clave, fue el ganador del desafío.

Objetivos pedagógicos y experiencia educativa

El juego-simulador busca que los estudiantes no solo adquieran habilidades de gestión empresarial, sino que también se tome conciencia sobre la importancia de la sostenibilidad.

Los principales objetivos pedagógicos del juego incluyen:

  • Crear conciencia sobre la urgencia de reducir las emisiones de carbono.
  • Entender la presión que enfrentan las empresas para ser más ecológicas.
  • Aprender los principios básicos de la contabilidad del carbono.
  • Conocer las acciones que las empresas pueden tomar para reducir su huella de carbono.
  • Utilizar paneles analíticos para mejorar la toma de decisiones en la reducción de emisiones.

El Mtro. Daniel Tenorio, facilitador del curso, atribuye este logro al compromiso de la UMAD en la formación de sus estudiantes. La universidad ha estado activa en iniciativas de SAP durante más de una década, contando con el apoyo de «SAP University Alliances» desde 2010, «ERPsim Lab – HEC Montreal» desde 2015 y «SAP Next-Gen» desde 2019.

entry.title: XML Templating error
entry.content:
Hi all,

I try to use the XML templating to reuse a table fragment in the IconTabBar.

I use xmlns:template="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.template/1" in the Tab xml:

 

<mvc:View
    controllerName="ui5.walkthrough.controller.Tab"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:template="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.template/1"
    displayBlock="true">
    <Page title="{i18n>homePageTitle}">
        <content>
            <IconTabBar id="candidateModelMappingTab" expanded="true" class="sapUiSmallContentPadding">
                <items>
                    <IconTabFilter icon="sap-icon://work-history" text="JobApp" tooltip="JobApp">
                        <template:with var="target">
                            <core:Fragment fragmentName="ui5.walkthrough.view.Field" type="XML"/>
						</template:with>
                    </IconTabFilter>
                </items>
            </IconTabBar>
        </content>
    </Page>
</mvc:View>

 

and create a view in Component.js:

 

      createContent : function () {
         return _XMLView.create({

				viewName : "ui5.walkthrough.controller.Tab"
			});
     }

 

 

 But I get an error as follow:

 Is there any body can give me some help?

entry.title: how to create a Custom API in S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The requirement is to create a single API that handles posting of for eg: sales orders, deliveries, and goods issues from an external system. While there are standard APIs available for each business process, the client prefers a unified API that executes all these processes synchronously and returns a confirmation.

My question is, how can I create such an API in the S/4HANA Cloud Public system? I have come across blogs discussing the conversion of custom business objects into APIs, but I do not want anything to be stored in a business object. Could you please suggest a solution I can follow?

Regards,
Shankar G

entry.title: Re: Is Ariba ready for E-Invoicing Processing?X-Rechnung,...
entry.content:
SAP Business Network

SAP Business Network, utilizing SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Cloud, supports various country-specific e-invoicing formats and distributes e-invoices to connected buyer systems.

  1. Supported Country Localizations: SAP Business Network supports several country-specific e-invoicing formats, including:
    • Germany XRechnung
    • Italy SdI
    • Romania
  2. Connected Systems for Buyers: E-invoices are distributed to various buyer systems such as:
    • SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
    • SAP Ariba Invoice Management
    • SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management
    • SAP S/4HANA
  3. Supplier Submission Formats:
    Country-specific enhancements may be required by suppliers. Suppliers can submit invoices in supported formats like:
    • cXML
    • EDIFACT
    • CSV
  4. OCR Solutions: OCR solutions may not be sufficient in countries with electronic invoicing mandates.
  5. Compliance with EN16931: Adherence to EN16931 depends on the country-mandated format.
  6. For further information, see https://help.sap.com/docs/business-network-for-trading-partners/business-network-invoicing/country-region-specific-tax-invoicing-process?q=xrechnung

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management Germany Specifics

  1. SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management, utilizing SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Cloud, can already receive Germany XRechnung from the Peppol network.
  2. Germany ZUGFeRD can already be processed with the embedded SAP Business AI Document Information Extraction service.

Future Legal Requirements and Enhancements
For updates on legal requirements and enhancements, refer to:

  • SAP Roadmap Explorer: SAP Roadmap Explorer (https://roadmaps.sap.com/)
  • SAP Regulatory Change Manager: SAP Regulatory Change Manager (https://app.main.regulatory-change-manager.cloud.sap/)

entry.title: Re: Calculated Inspection Characteristics using BAPI_INSP...
entry.content:
Hi ArnoBrouwer

When i'm using QE51N, it's working fine (calculated characteristics are calculated and closed by save action)
I thought that the BAPI would also trigger the calculation of calculated characteristics (if i refer to the SAP Note 3088890) but it's not the case for me. Another workaround is to trigger the calculation myself in my ABAP code and save the result in the corresponding calculated characteristics using the BAPI (each time a value is changed on a given characteristic on the same inspection unit) but it's obviously not really a clean solution in my opinion

entry.title: Datas are listed upon entering % special character
entry.content:
Hey Readers,

Hope you are doing great! 

Users may question why they are able to view all data by simply inputting the "%" symbol in the custom field within the quotation. The reason behind this is that it is the default behavior. If you are familiar with SQL queries, you would know that the "%" symbol is commonly used to retrieve relevant data from a database. Similarly, when importing data from a custom table into your custom field, you will notice this same behavior.

When you utilize the % symbol for a custom field that retrieves data from a custom table, it displays all the data contained within the custom table.

This outcome is anticipated and in line with the intended functionality. In this following image you observe that % is retrieving all data.

If you desire a particular output, you have the option to utilize the percentage symbol (%) followed by a letter to achieve your desired result.

In this following image, you can observe the example how I retrieved specific output.

Thank you for reading this article. I hope this information may be helpful to you.

Stay tuned 🙂

Best Regards,

Abirami

entry.title: Re: ERPsim Manufacturing Sustainability Game (Preset 3)

SAP University Alliances

entry.title: Re: Why get_selected_rows of cl_gui_alv_grid isn't working with only one selected record?
entry.content:
What I mean "Minimum Reproducible Example" is that anyone can just copy/paste the code, and it works immediately, e.g. run this program, click on "Click me!" and you can see in debug that all selected rows are correctly returned.

REPORT.
CLASS lcl_app DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS constructor.
    METHODS on_toolbar FOR EVENT toolbar OF cl_gui_alv_grid
      IMPORTING e_object e_interactive.
    METHODS on_user_command FOR EVENT user_command OF cl_gui_alv_grid
      IMPORTING e_ucomm
                sender.
    DATA go_alv   TYPE REF TO cl_gui_alv_grid.
    DATA gt_sbook TYPE TABLE OF sbook.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_app IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    go_alv = NEW cl_gui_alv_grid( i_parent = cl_gui_container=>screen0 ).
    SELECT * FROM sbook UP TO 10 ROWS INTO TABLE gt_sbook. " filled by prog SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR
    SET HANDLER on_toolbar FOR go_alv.
    SET HANDLER on_user_command FOR go_alv.
    go_alv->set_table_for_first_display( EXPORTING i_structure_name = 'SBOOK'
                                                   is_layout        = VALUE #( sel_mode = 'A' )
                                         CHANGING  it_outtab        = gt_sbook ).
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD on_toolbar.
    APPEND VALUE #( function = 'ZZZ'
                    text     = 'Click me!' ) TO e_object->mt_toolbar.
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD on_user_command.
    IF e_ucomm = 'ZZZ'.
      sender->get_selected_rows( IMPORTING et_row_no = DATA(lt_row_no) ).
      MESSAGE |Count selected lines: { lines( lt_row_no ) }| TYPE 'I'.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

DATA go_app TYPE REF TO lcl_app.
PARAMETERS dummy.
AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
  IF go_app IS NOT BOUND.
    go_app = NEW #( ).
  ENDIF.

entry.title: SAP ABAP Optimization Help
entry.content:
Dear all,

Could someone help me to optimize this ABAP CODE? It works in dev System however, after I move it to the live; This program doesn't finish.
REPORT ZBI0005.
tables: vbap , zbi_vbap_atwrt .

DATA: lt_zbi_vbap TYPE TABLE OF zbi_vbap_atwrt,
ls_zbi_vbap TYPE zbi_vbap_atwrt.

TYPES: BEGIN OF gty_list,
vbeln TYPE VBELN_VA,
posnr TYPE POSNR_VA,
cuobj TYPE CUOBJ_VA,
ATWRT TYPE atwrt,
END OF gty_list.


DATA: iv_cuobj TYPE inob-cuobj,
lt_data TYPE TABLE OF conf_out,
ls_data TYPE conf_out,
lt_atwrt TYPE TABLE OF char20
.

DATA: gt_data TYPE TABLE OF gty_list,
gs_data TYPE gty_list.

select p~vbeln , p~posnr, p~cuobj
from vbap as p inner join vbak as k on p~vbeln = k~vbeln
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @GT_data
where p~erdat >= '20240101'
and k~VBTYP = 'C'.

DELETE FROM zbi_vbap_atwrt.

LOOP AT gt_data INTO gs_data.
CLEAR: lt_data, lt_atwrt.
iv_cuobj = gs_data-cuobj.

CALL FUNCTION 'VC_I_GET_CONFIGURATION'
EXPORTING
instance = iv_cuobj
TABLES
configuration = lt_data
EXCEPTIONS
instance_not_found = 1
internal_error = 2
no_class_allocation = 3
instance_not_valid = 4
others = 5.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

DELETE lt_data WHERE atnam <> 'H_FYT_KTG_KON'.

LOOP AT lt_data INTO ls_data.
READ TABLE gt_data WITH KEY vbeln = gs_data-vbeln posnr = gs_data-posnr cuobj = gs_data-cuobj INTO gs_data.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
gs_data-atwrt = ls_data-atwrt.

CLEAR ls_zbi_vbap.
ls_zbi_vbap-mandt = sy-mandt.
ls_zbi_vbap-vbeln = gs_data-vbeln.
ls_zbi_vbap-posnr = gs_data-posnr.
ls_zbi_vbap-cuobj = gs_data-cuobj.
ls_zbi_vbap-atwrt = gs_data-atwrt.

APPEND ls_zbi_vbap TO lt_zbi_vbap.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

ELSE.

ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.


INSERT zbi_vbap_atwrt FROM TABLE lt_zbi_vbap.
COMMIT WORK.

entry.content:
Hi all,

I had a requirement to add custom field in FB50 header basic data, 

Please suggest how this can be done.

Stephan

entry.title: Re: Calling the Action Project in loop from Build Process Automation
entry.content: Hi, did you manage to find the option to loop/iterate in the process flow?

entry.title: FreeHand SQL query with input parameters
entry.content:
Good morning SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere experts.

I recently created a successful OData connection from a view with Datasphere parameters to use the data in an SAP Analytics Cloud Planning model.

The problem I have is that I want to select the parameters from a FreeHand query when creating the model and I get different errors.

I am testing several syntaxes:

CV_MOV_CCEE_RD_WP(P_MANDT='100',P_DATE_FROM=1980-01-01,P_DATE_TO=1980-01-01)/Set

And I get this error:

If I use this syntax

CV_MOV_CCEE_RD_WP/CV_MOV_CCEE_RD_WP(P_MANDT='100',P_DATE_FROM=1980-01-01,P_DATE_TO=1980-01-01)/Set

I get an error like this:

When I use this syntax:

CV_MOV_CCEE_RD_WP(P_MANDT='100',P_DATE_FROM=1980-01-01,P_DATE_TO=1980-01-01)

I get this error:

So I understand that the syntax here is incorrect.

I have tried ending the statement with /Results but it doesn't work either.

I have consulted other questions and documentation such as these:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sac-how-to-use-odata-v4-with-parameters-exposed-from-a-s-4hana-cds-view/qaq-p/12690021
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-sac-free-hand-query/qaq-p/12622748
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3361384392.html

But I have not been able to find a solution

What would I have to do to be able to do the freehand query for views with input parameters coming from Datasphere over OData connections?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: No Inspection Lot creation with Inspection Rule EWM
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a scenario where I want to suppress the inspection lot creation for a specific BP. For this I want to create a specific inspection rule just for the BP. Is there any field what I can use in the inspection rule?

If there is another possibility to archive this feel free to provide.

 

Greetings

Steffen

entry.title: Re: Hana Cloud Dashboard "Uh oh. Something went amiss."
entry.content: Any clue what is happening ?

entry.title: Join Our Espresso Session on Improving Asset Management with AI
entry.content:
Attention all professionals in the oil, gas, energy, and utilities industry!

Are you interested in learning more about how Artificial Intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing asset management in the Oil, Gas, and Energy and Utilities industry?  Join us for our upcoming Espresso Session on September 24, 2024, from 4 PM to 4:30 PM CET to explore the latest developments in AI technology and how it is being utilized to improve asset management in these industries.

 During this session, we will cover the following topics:

  • Anomaly detection, failure prediction and visual inspection: AI in SAP Asset Performance Management
  • How work planning and execution with SAP S/4HANA benefits from AI
  • Optimizing schedule and dispatch of maintenance and service work using AI in SAP Field Service Management

Mark your calendars and join our Asset Management expert @GeroBieser for September 24, 2024, from 4 PM to 4:30 PM CET. Please register here

Don't miss out on this chance to stay ahead of the curve and learn how AI can empower your organization to effectively manage assets and enhance overall performance.

We look forward to welcoming you to this Espresso Session and exploring the exciting possibilities that AI offers for the oil, gas, energy, and utilities industry's asset management.

entry.title: Re: iOS Build Failing
entry.content: It's working now. I started over generating new server key, AppID, and provision on the apple developers site and to my surprise it worked. Not sure if that was actually the issue or a build problem but it's working now.

entry.title: Re: iOS Usage Strings not updating in build
entry.content: It seems like this would be a really easy fix for the developers at SAP as it's just replacing text on the output file. Same as the notification for Android, it's using the  Appgyver icon instead of what was uploaded in the assets area.

Some layouts will give a list but some just don't in SAP ECC. One I tried worked, next time it did not. I tried about a half dozen different layouts, maybe 50% worked. Created a new one, it is working. I am using these layout in T-code: FBL1N. What might be the issue. Do I have to contact SAP finance  consultant or ABAB consultant?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to check average number of users connecting to th...
entry.content: I would suggest you check the option that you have with the SAP Cloud ALM functionality called Real User Monitoring Content.

entry.title: How we can exclude documents that should be excluded from eDocument process?
entry.content:
In e-waybill process we need to exclude some delivery notes from DRC edocument cockpit. There is a process that use the same delivery type but some documents need to include to  edocument cockpit and some documents should be excluded. How we can manage to exclude documents that should be excluded from edocument process?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How we can exclude documents that should be excluded...
entry.content:
The Standard solution will create an eDocument in the eInvoice node also. If you wish to make it no relevant for eDocument creation, you can use the BAdI EDOC_ADAPTOR_CLOUD.

You need to implement the BadI EDOC_ADAPTOR_CLOUD~IS_RELEVANT where you have to set Relevant Flag to False. Kindly note that you will not be able to use this directly. Make use of embedded steampunk. Kindly take help of your ABAPer. 

 

Use the Link below to get more information on Steampunk-

https://blogs.sap.com/2022/09/05/embedded-steampunk-some-more-details-for-abap-developers/

entry.title: SOAP using communication arrangement
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm doing some test with outbound SOAP services following SAP guide (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/ff6e400b4066430f85e0b16f561900f4.html) but I have found several problems.

1. Using URL

I used method cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_url. The service I used to test is:

 http://www.dneonline.com/calculator.asmx?wsdl

The main problem was an error related to SOAPActions.

After reviewing a very, very, old thread from @thomas_jung, I was able to solve it also in SAP Cloud.

Using method set_soap_action of destination (IF_SOAP_DESTINATION), we can add the SOAPAction and the issue is solved.

This way, we were able to run the service properly.

 

2. Using communication arrangement

In order to avoid hardcoding the url in ABAP, I tried following method to create the destination: cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement

When setting up the communication system, HTTPS/HTTP cannot be included. ok, no problem, let's go.

 

But when we create the communication arrangement, Service URL automatically turns to https, that does not exist.

 

It obviously fails.

3. Using HTTPS service

At this point, I decided to use another free soap service, HTTPS, in order to continue with my tests.

https://www.w3schools.com/xml/tempconvert.asmx

The connection check, fails. 

If the path is removed, for service url: https://www.w3schools.com:443, the connection check is ok. I read old questions about it, and it seems it could work even if the check fails, so I continued…

4. Back to SOAPACtions

Using cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement, the object we get is different from previous one (if_soap_destination vs if_proxy_destination) so, set_soap_action is not available. Not sure if it's an error, as per comments, the receiving parameter should be SOAP Destination object for both.

Without SOAPAction, we have same error than point 1:

SoapFaultCode:4 Server did not recognize the value of HTTP Header SOAPAction: .

 

At this point, I have two main problems

I don't know how to configure arrangement for HTTP (if possible)

I'm not able to add SOAPActions to SOAP destinations created via arrangements.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Time out error with Build process automation while running GUI screen recording
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am encountering a few challenges while running SAP GUI screen recording using Build Process Automation.

I created a recording to upload a supporting document for a parked document in FB02, and I am frequently experiencing the following issues:

1. { "retcode": -1, "error": "Error on action SETVALUE -> Access is denied [error UIA00085]." }

2. MyAppli.kill failed: Timeout error: Waiting for application a_uploadXlAutomation to close (120 s).

3. Timeout error: Waiting for screen(s) s_sAP to appear (120 s).

Can someone assist with resolving these issues?

 Thanks & Regards

Pavan

entry.title: Re: Unable to load instances - Please wait while SAP HANA Cloud resolves the issue
entry.content: For me the error disappeared in 3 hours, Now I have restarted the HANA Cloud instance. History: I deleted the hdbtable and tried to deploy and got similar error.

entry.title: Outgoing Payment - Discount field
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Does anyone know why when I open a self-Payment the discount field is not visible?
But when I open it from the A/P invoice, it is visible.
Why this behavior?
Is it controllable?

Details:
SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.140) FP 2011 (64-bit)
Localization - Germany

entry.title: Retrieving the FCM Token on iOS
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, I'm wondering if anyone has successfully received the FCM Token for iOS. It works great on Android using 'Get Firebase Device Token' and also 'Get Device Token'.

When I run it on iOS nothing happens, the flow stops even though 'Initialize Firebase' was successful. Since the flow just stops without any message or error it seems something is missing.

I need the FCM token for sending messages from the backend server (this is working great for tokens received on Android)

It would be really helpful to know if someone has successfully received an iOS FCM Token and what if there are any special things that need to be done to get the token?

Thank you!

Sam

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hallo,

I just tried to renew my license for AH4 via minisap. My AH4 shows a system number of 000000000800925495 (which corresponded to previous license requests via mnisap). But now the generated license has a system number of 000000000800940228 which makes updating the license impossible. So my question is how to update the license key?

Thanks in advance, Alexander

entry.title: How to add Date Range filter in Column header of ui table(sap.ui.table)
entry.content:
I am trying to add a Date Range filter in the column header of an sap.ui.table.Table. The solution I found in this SAP Community post seems to be outdated and doesn't work with the latest SAP UI5 versions.

Is there an updated approach to implement a Date Range filter directly in the column header? Ideally, I would like to use sap.m.DateRangeSelection or a similar control that fits within the sap.ui.table.Column. How can this be achieved while ensuring compatibility with recent UI5 versions?

Any help or working example would be much appreciated!

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Hi @chrisesco ,

for me, approach 2 works for CDS views as well. But for CDS-Views, you can also build in a change data capture (cdc) to load the data with a delta.

BR,

Thore

entry.title: Re: Forecasting with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: @achab as this blog post is referenced in the official documentation, It would be good to update it to the Optimized Story capabilities. (Predictive Forecast (in tables) is no longer supported)

entry.title: Where it's better to create an enhacement for VFX3?
entry.content:
Where it's better to create an enhacement for VFX3?
I want to save a data to mine Ztable after 'Release to Accounting'
And i want this enhancement to execute only with VFX3 t-code.

entry.title: Re: Outgoing Payment - Discount field
entry.content:
Hi,

The discount field is visible from the AP Invoice, if the Payment terms assigned to the Invoice has discount definition. So, if you have Payment terms with 2% discount, then 2% will pop up with the definition days as soon as you click on Payment Means icon.

Regarding the Self-Payment, it is a Payment on Account which is like an advance and not assigned to any Invoice or document and hence discount does not automatically display. 

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Cloud ALM Monitoring Alerts are grouped
entry.content:
Hi there,

I have enabled the monitoring use cases in Cloud ALM for an S/4HANA system with alerting.

I notice the below:

1. In Health Monitoring: For all dumps created in a particular day, only 1 alert is generated and all dumps are added into it.
2. In Exception Monitoring: For all ABAP Update error generated in a day, again only 1 alert is created and all update errors are listed/grouped into single alert.

Is this the standard behaviour of Cloud ALM? Can this be modified ?

I know grouping alerts into alert aggregates makes it easy to handle. But I guess it is not helping.

For example: Different issues need different individual/teams to be involved in fixing it.
Having one alert and multiple error into it cannot be assigned to multiple individuals at the same time.

Any thoughts on this and a option to generate 1 alert per error encountered explored by anyone in this community ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Thanks for writing everyone - invites on on their way. 

For those waiting for codes, we ask for some patience. We are working through quite a backlog.

entry.title: Issue in the Building SAP Asset Manager Client2405(Could not find com.sap.cloud.android:fiori:7.1.8)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I'm trying to build SAP Service and Asset Manager client 2405 for Android on Windows 11 but I get an "Error: Failed to run ns build android" with below error. Could anyone please provide some insights or suggestions to resolve this issue?

using versions -
1. SAM Metadata 2405 - (ASSETMGRMD240500P_4-80009241)
2. MDK Plugin-SDK (SAM Extensions) 2405.0.4 - (MDKPLG_SDK_AND00P_4-80008901)

3. MDK 24.4.3 - (MDKCLNT23808P_7-80008652 (2))
4. ASSTMGRBRNDSDK00P_4-80008827


Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

SAP BTP, Kyma runtime SAP Field Service Management SAP Maintenance Assistant mobile app mobile development kit client SAP Mobile Asset Management SAP Mobile Services SAP ERP, add-on for mobile integration

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content: You can find it on the homepage of learning.sap.com when you scroll down

entry.title: Re: Dump SAP GRC PC reports into custom tables
entry.content:
It is weird to reply to my own query but I would like to share that I managed to solve my problem.

You can run the report GRFN_REPORT_EXECUTE for the standard GRC report you want and send the result/output as an workflow item or save to a file or send to an email address or store into a customised table.

The report also allows you to run as a background job as well and schedule to run on a periodic basis.

entry.title: Employee Import 305 Best Practices
entry.content:
1. Documentation.

Once you know that you’re going to work with Employee Import/HR Feed, get familiar with the records that you’re going to use. Although the Import file is quite extensive, most likely your company won’t use all the record types available. Once you know which are the record types, check the information about them in the Employee Import PDF. Each column presented in Excel has its own reference in the Employee Import document. Try to work with both simultaneously.

 

  1. Record 100. What to remember?
  • Record 100 is mandatory to include in employee imports. Without record 100 (or with an error included in 100), the SAP Concur system won’t be able to read your flat file.
  • In the record 100, in column 3, the best is to put the value ‘SSO’. Even if your company doesn’t use Single Sign-On, from a security perspective, SSO is the most beneficial for SAP Concur customers. In that way, the user must use the ‘Forgot Password’ link, and the initial password will be sent to the user at his email address.

 

  • UPDATE/REPLACE: what should we use?

 

 

In most of the scenarios, please use ‘update’ in column 4. Why?

REPLACE: Replace the existing record completely with the one in the feed.

UPDATE: Update the existing record with only those fields that are non-blank in the import file. Existing passwords for employees are never overwritten.

 

Scenario 1: 100,0,SSO,UPDATE,EN,N,N

 

The above import settings used in the ‘305' record employee import file will update existing records with only those fields that are non-blank in the import file.

 

Scenario 2: 100,0,SSO,REPLACE,EN,N,N

 

The above import settings used in the '300/305' record employee import file will replace the existing record completely with one available in feed.

 

It is recommended to use 'UPDATE' instead of 'REPLACE'. As 'REPLACE' wipes off the existing data in the user's profile (if non-mandatory field values are not provided in the employee import file)

 

 

  1. Record 305.
  • Login ID (column 6): the best is to set the email address as the login ID. SAP Concur requires the login ID to be in “@domain” format.
  • Locale code (column 9): Please refer to the ‘employee_import.pdf’ guide (section 7, Appendix). Do not use ISO codes here.
  • Reimbursement CRN Code (column 13): please use ISO codes here. It can be either a three-letter digit or a letter currency code for re-imbursement currency.
  • Active Y/N (column 15): if you load the user for the first time, please use the value ‘Y’. Using ‘N’ might cause some issues, for example, for approver assignments. It's not possible to set a deactivation date by import, but it can work when you do it manually through the user interface.
  • Custom 17 (column 38) is mostly used as SAP vendor ID.
  • Employee ID of Approvers (column 59-61): Before assigning the approver to the user, remember that the approver must already exist in SAP Concur, or the approver must be included in the same file as the user. If you go for the second option, do not worry about the order; managers can be at the beginning of the file as well as at the end. SAP Concur reads the file twice and is adjusting the information.

 

  1. Synchronization between Expense and Travel (record 305).

 

In many cases, SAP Concur clients want to implement Expense and Travel a module. SAP Concur can offer some options to make the synchronization of the name of the user smoother and more efficient. The two settings in SAP Concur are:

  1. Employee Import Updates Name Fields: this setting defines if the Employee import will update the profile names after creation.
  2. Synchronize Name Fields between Travel and Expense: this setting defines if the profile will have a single set of names and primary email address, or if this should be broken between Expense and Travel to be 2 separate sets.

              

1. Employee Name… is set to

2. Synchronize Name… is set to

Result

YES

YES

Best practice #1 - the most straightforward
- Profile has a single set of names and email address.
- Employee import (305) updates names and primary email address for existing users

NO

YES

Best practice #2 - Preventing import updates while maintaining single data points. Users in Expense searched by travel name or Employee ID.
- Profile has a single set of names and email address.
- Employee import (305) will NOT update names and email address for existing users.

YES

NO

- Profile now has 2 sets of names and email addresses: a main one used for Travel and a separate one for Expense.
- Employee import (305) WILL update names for existing Expense, and primary email address for both Travel and Expense. Travel names remain untouched by the import. NOTE: in this scenario you may have potentially different email addresses for each service (but remember 305 overwrites them both).

NO

NO

- Profile now has 2 sets of names and email addresses: a main one used for Travel and a separate one for Expense.
- Employee import (305) will NOT update names for existing users on either of the 2 sets. It WILL update the primary email address. NOTE: in this scenario you may have potentially different email addresses for each service (but remember 305 overwrites them both).

 

 

  1. Record 350.
  • Travel permissions – some of my customers want to provide the end user information like address, job title, but they don’t want to give Travel wizard user permission. The good information is that the setup is possible. The 350-employee import will update the user profile with the data even if the travel permission is not assigned.
  • Travel Class Name (Column 18) - Travel policy definition (what the user is allowed to book), needs to be pre-defined in the TRAVEL module.

 

  1. Massive load of HR master data.

Some SAP Concur customers are not sure how the load of users should be processed if we’re talking about thousands of end users. The best practice here is to send multiple flat files and separate them per country or region. However, you might want to consider importing any accounts with Approver = Y first, regardless of the country. This way, the cross-country approver issue is avoided.

entry.title: Disassembly production order create again actual production order SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding and any kind of linking between actual production order and it's Disassembly production order ? 

How we can get information like this is our actual original production order and against this we have created this Disassembly production order.

Disassembly production order, SAP Business One, Production Order

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Reading long text for MIC in a inspection plan / S4 HANA Public CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi all,

how to display Long text of Quality Master Inspection characteristic in Record Inspection Results ?

it should be saw after upgrade 2408, but we still miss it.

Thanks for help.

Monika

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi @Kami_Z ,

If you already have a grasp of IT project management, then any of the "implementation" tracks might be for you. These are teaching you how to run projects that are implementing a specific SAP solution on the customer side.

These should be free to study for:

https://learning.sap.com/search?access=free&query=implementing+public+cloud&page=1&get-certified=true

entry.title: Re: Where is SAP EA framework and methodology full description?
entry.content:
Hello

Here are some resources : 

  • SAP Enterprise Architecture Methodology Guide (.PDF from SAP-Help)
  • Learning Journey: SAP Intelligent Enterprise Architecture and Processes
  • SAP-Learning Search Query based on Role "Architect
  • SAP-Blog / list provided by Simon Polovina

These are some of the free, currently maintained available Resources. There must be more Resources out there, but those might not be free, outdated, etc.

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Vienna 2024 - Location Announcement
entry.content:
We are very pleased to announce that this years SIT Vienna will take place in the office of






SCC EDV-Beratung AG
Mantlergasse 30-32
1130 Wien

in the heart of Vienna's beautiful 13th district Hietzing, right around the corner of the historic Klimt Villa (which is also well worth a visit).

A big, big thank you to SCC for letting us use this space for the event.

The location is easily accessible by public transport - the subway lines U4 Unter St. Veit and Ober St. Veit are just a brisk 10 minute walk away.
Make sure to check out Viennas public transport options here.
Limited parking will be available at the venue.


Interested in speaking at the event? We'd love to hear from you!
Have a look at our Call For Speakers here.

Also make sure to check out our website at sit.wien.
Registration for the event will start soon.


Have a nice weekend,
- SITVIE2024 team

entry.title: Re: No Inspection Lot creation with Inspection Rule EWM
entry.content: Solved. Inspection control can be used

entry.title: Re: How to setup Postman for consuming SAP DATASPHERE APIs?
entry.content:
Hi @Asim_Munshi 

We are trying to setup Postman in order to connect Datasphere to Google Cloud Looker to do a data preview. We are experiencing a problem with getting a token. On the stage where we connect to the BTP application, it gives the following error:

 

For this type of connection, what would constitute the Redirect URL? please assist.

#Datasphere

entry.title: Re: iOS Build Failing
entry.content:
I generated a new p12 and provisional profile and still receive the same failed message:

AB version: 2.13.4
COMMAND: 

 npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-123250\"" 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-123250\""

entry.title: Re: Form - Regular Expression Input Validation Message
entry.content:
Hi Joyca,

We faced the same situation last year when the feature was introduced. 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/231967/?section=sectionComments

As a workaround we just edited the error message in the downloaded HTML code...of course that might not be an option especially if you are publishing the form and not downloading it and deploying it manually.

 

Kind Regards,

Markus

entry.title: Re: Deleting a Table from Excel Using ABAP2XLSX
entry.content:
If you wish to delete a whole tab, look into ZCL_EXCEL_WORKSHEETS (with S at the end).

The REMOVE method should be the one for you.

entry.title: Re: Creating A Simple Mobile Attendance Application With Local Storage
entry.content:
Hi Sankara1 

Noted with thanks!

Best regards

entry.title: Move Quantities in MF50 without consolidation of multiple planned orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

May i kindly seek for your help regarding our issue in MF50. Currently, whenever I try to move orders from one bucket to another using the move quantities along time axis icon, the orders are being consolidated. Such that if I have 2 planned orders in the same bucket. Say 40 and 50. When I try to move them, they are moved and a planned order with a quantity of 90 can be seen, instead of two orders.

Is there a configuration I might have missed? I have tried config of equal distribution, load on start date , load on end date but that's also consolidating quantities. It is very tedious to move every single order. Hoping so much for your help regarding this matter.

Thanks,

Jay

entry.title: Re: Where is SAP EA framework and methodology full description?
entry.content:
Thank you @NTeunckens

The pdf file is great, but seems outdated.
All others resources are not a detailed SAP EA TOGAF based methodology full description.

entry.title: Re: CAP application gives 401 unauthorized error after de...
entry.content: No, there doesn't seem to be any errors in the log.

entry.title: REFX- Flexible Real Estate Management- Interest Expense Calculation
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I just wanna ask how the interest exp in IFRS16 that is in REFX module calculated? What the approach ? Many of questions I have on it like based on what the interest % multiply is will multiply in clearing or dep. ? 

Please I am looking to full explanation from A to Z on how and what the approach used to calculate the interest exp. For the lease contract in refx. 

 

Thank you all!

entry.title: Re: FreeHand SQL query with input parameters
entry.content:
I believe SAC is not able yet to fully consume Odata parameters, hence you see this "Basic CDI Support" item on the product roadmap as 'future vision':

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67838200100800006884&q=odata&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=000D3ABE796A1EECB1F6529A576C2C99

entry.title: Re: ABAP BW RSA1 program name of routine
entry.content:
I found the answer I was looking for

RSA1-> search for the created routine -> click extras -> click Display Generated Program 

I found it from this blog

BW transformation debugging a start routine - SAP Community

Debugging ABAP routine Performance in SAP BW (element61.be)

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi Alexander 

just edit the lic file and  replace the system number.

You can successfully install the license afterwards. 

Kind regards Ralf

entry.title: Re: OPS6/7: Text derieved from field PRPS-VERNR and PRPS-ASTNR is not changing
entry.content: Hi Christian,
